name: plugin install copies the tests into rubric/tests/_community/<plugin-id>/ at the architecture-named path
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/example/tests/foo/valid && printf 'name: example
rules: [{id: foo, detector: x}]
' > stub-clones/acme/example/plugin.yaml && printf '{"code":"x"}
' > stub-clones/acme/example/tests/foo/valid/case.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/example --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass 2>err.txt && [ -f rubric/tests/_community/example/foo/valid/case.json ] && echo ok 1>&2
